description: Host information includes data that correlates the host data to detected security events
examples:
Command Example
!vectra-get-hosts threat_score_gte=20
Context Example
{
"Vectra.Host": [
{
"ActiveTraffic": false,
"CertaintyScore": 45,
name: vectra-get-hosts

outputs.description: The learned hostname Vectra.Host.TargetsKeyAsset Flag indicating if the host has a detection targeting a key asset
outputs.name: Vectra.Host.Name

outputs.description: The current certainty score correlated to this host Vectra.Host.DetectionID List of Detections for Account
outputs.name: Vectra.Host.CertaintyScore

outputs.description: Flag indicating if the host is a key asset Vectra.Host.State The state of this host
outputs.name: Vectra.Host.KeyAsset

outputs.description: The current threat score correlated to this host Vectra.Host.LastDetection Last detection activity from this host (Timestamp format: YYYY-MM-DD HH-MM-SS GMT)
outputs.name: Vectra.Host.Threat_Score

outputs.description: Last source IP associated with this host Vectra.Host.ID ID of the Host
outputs.name: Vectra.Host.IP
